description: Wire-level push notification transport — APNS, ntfy, OneSignal, Pushover. Distinct from notifications-v1 (in-app/operator notification semantics). First implementer: ntfy-blade-mcp.

operations.description: Publish a message to a topic / channel for delivery to subscribed devices
operations.name: topic_publish

operations.description: Register a device token (APNS / FCM / web push) for push delivery
operations.name: device_register

operations.description: Get delivery status / outcome for a previously sent message (id, deduped, failed, delivered)
operations.name: delivery_status

operations.description: Subscribe a registered device to a topic
operations.name: topic_subscribe

operations.description: List topics the account / device may publish to or is subscribed to
operations.name: topic_list

operations.description: List registered devices for the account
operations.name: device_list

operations.description: Retrieve recent published messages for a topic (where the transport retains them)
operations.name: message_history

operations.description: Delete a topic / channel and its retained messages
operations.name: topic_delete

operations.description: Revoke a device token so it can no longer receive pushes
operations.name: device_revoke

title: notifications-push-v1
